subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Hannen, spoken on 1909-02-23
subcodes.first_line: this is a matter of Divine Will. That although the Theosophists dwelt upon Karma and ultimate perfection, this was not to be expected, as degrees of existence must always be presented.
subcodes.subjects: @maintainance of degrees in society, @Theosophy, @differences in human capacity, @fulfillment of true potential
